title: draba bartholomewii
intro: Draba bartholomewii, a perennial plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae), is native to the Hawaiian Islands and is also known as the "Hawaiian rockcress." The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Draba bartholomewii has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various ailments.
